name: pua
description: Forces high-agency exhaustive problem-solving with corporate PUA pressure escalation when the AI is passive, gives up, skips verification, produces low-quality work, or the user explicitly asks for PUA/try-harder mode. v3.4.2 restores the authentic Microsoft flavor with Connects, Impact Descriptors, SLITE/LITE, PIP/GVSA, and Three Circles of Impact for fixed-thinking failures. Does not target normal first-attempt requests.
